text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Fine! That reference book on fairies you
lent me was sooo fun to read!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you enjoyed it! I brought it from home.
It's a personal favorite of mine. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I hope it wasn't too difficult translating it into
Japanese so you could understand...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! It was easy-peasy! It felt like figuring
out the spells in a grimoire—really fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Having some dictionaries on hand certainly
helped, though!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's like the saying, "What one likes, one will do
well." Right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. I happen to have some other
books from home that you might enjoy, like fairy
tale anthologies and picture books about witches.
Would you like to read them?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You bet I would! I'll read anything you've got if
it's about magic! Are you sure you don't mind?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's no trouble at all, little Miss Witch. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! ♪ My witch training's coming along great
thanks to you!
